title: Review Approval
description: Human sign-off on a specific frozen candidate's FULL-LENGTH review render (task section 18, hardened per the follow-up task's section 5). Approval identity is candidate_hash + render_bundle_hash + candidate_source_sha -- NOT the current git HEAD SHA: a later commit that only adds this approval record (or any other metadata-only commit) must never invalidate a candidate that hasn't actually changed. `frozen_candidate_hash` (the pre-hardening field, a hash of the whole committed file) is retained only for historical approval records; a NEW approval must use candidate_hash (the candidate's own deterministic identity hash field, not a file hash) instead. `proof_artifact`/legacy top-level fields are likewise historical-only.

frozen_candidate_hash.description: Historical field (pre-hardening): sha256 of the whole committed frozen_candidate.json file. Do not populate on a new approval -- operational_metadata.created_at inside that file changes on every rebuild, making a whole-file hash unstable; use candidate_hash instead.

candidate_hash.description: The approved frozen candidate's own canonical_candidate_identity-derived candidate_hash field (deterministic; excludes created_at/run IDs).

candidate_source_sha.description: The source commit SHA the approved candidate was built from (canonical_candidate_identity.source_commit_sha) -- NOT necessarily the current HEAD at verification time. A later commit (e.g. one that only adds this approval record) does not change this value and must not invalidate the approval.

review_run_id.description: The 'ORVYQ Full-Length Candidate Review' workflow run that produced the approved review artifact. The final encode workflow's own approved_review_run_id input must match this exactly.

review_total_frames.description: Must equal the frozen candidate's own total_frames -- a review of anything less than the full candidate cannot be approved.

review_video_sha256.description: sha256 of the actual reviewed MP4 file, so the approval names exact reviewed bytes, not just a run id.

proof_artifact.description: Legacy/historical field name (short-proof era) -- do not populate on a new approval; use the review_* fields instead.
